description: Year-by-year first-registration counts across all vehicle types. Use when user asks all-vehicle annual registration trend. Passenger-car EV trend: dmr-car-ev-adoption-trend.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2030 | STATS vehicle_count = COUNT(*) BY registration_year = _foerste_registrering_aar | SORT registration_year ASC | LIMIT 150
